name: Manganese X Energy Corp.
summary: Manganese X Energy Corp. engages in the acquisition and development of mineral properties in Canada. The company's property portfolio include Houlton Woodstock Manganese property consisting of 55 claims totaling 1,228 hectares located in Carlton County, New Brunswick; Peter Lake Copper-Nickel-Cobalt property comprising 34 claims totaling approximately 1,985 hectares located in the Mont-Laurier Terrane, Central Grenville Province; and Lac Aux Bouleaux property consisting of 4 mineral claims totaling 738.12 hectares located in Mont-Laurier in southern Qu√É¬©bec. It also explores for copper, nickel, cobalt, and graphite deposits. The company was formerly known as Sunset Cove Mining Inc. and changed its name to Manganese X Energy Corp. in December 2016. Manganese X Energy Corp. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Saint-Laurent, Canada.
